title: lepidium austrinum
intro: Lepidium austrinum, also known as Desert Cress or Australian Cress, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium austrinum include its ability to reduce symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and support immune function. Lepidium austrinum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine as a raw ingredient in various remedies.
